note: Phase 4.1 — SIC decoder + pedestal grid under the LOCKED fallback channel model (sigma8 R8/G5/B10, 3x3 crosstalk, gamma 2.2). SER = worst-plane module symbol error rate over 3 seeds, 3721 modules. Naive = display-uniform grid (ped 0) + per-channel threshold decode after algebraic crosstalk inversion.
finding: Gamma compresses dark display-space level gaps under linear-space interference: naive decode fails (~3-6% SER). SIC (nearest predicted response, 2 iterations) + PEDESTAL=64 grid is the remedy. G L=8 stretch does NOT survive fallback crosstalk (~2.2%) — allocator re-checks on measured sigma.
